name: SunRise2FLXFC

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: FB238F05-1672-466E-9991-B397650979A2

comment:
IP65 modular LED blinder with 2x300W RGBA+WW source.
The Sunrise 2FLXFC is a versatile modular lighting fixture, combining the functionalities of a blinder, strobe, and washlight with high output, ideal for large-scale indoor and outdoor stages, thanks to its IP65 rating.
